abilities.description:
Gain a stack every 3s, up to a maximum of 3 stacks. Upon gaining a stack, your movement speed is increased by 20% for 7s.

Whenever you take damage from a player-controlled unit or Roshan, consume all stacks to gain an all damage barrier for 7s that absorbs 120 damage per stack (360 max).
abilities.title: Hallowed

name: Consecrated Wraps
notes:
Stacks cannot be gained for 3s after you take damage from a player-controlled unit or Roshan.
Self-damage and HP Loss damage cannot remove stacks.
Movement speed buff does not stack.
Movement speed buff is only provided if you have reached maximum stacks at least once while the item is equipped.
